email.subject: One-number reply — 1101 Madison St roof
email.body:
Ralph, quick question on 1101 Madison St before I follow up further. Where does the roof stand with your team?

1. We have a maintenance or replacement plan in place
2. We know it needs attention but haven't scheduled anything
3. Not a current priority

Reply with the number — helps me know if it's worth another conversation.
email.signature_line: 16 years serving commercial properties in Northern and Central New Jersey.
email.sender_title: Commercial Roofing Advisor, Garden State Commercial Roofing
